subjects.description: A stylized stick figure woman, looking stressed, with dark circles under her eyes, wearing simple office attire.
subjects.action: She is drowning in a sea of floating credit card bills and student loan statements.

image_prompt.environment: A chaotic, dark room filled with crumpled bills and financial papers.
image_prompt.lighting: Dim, oppressive lighting with harsh shadows.
image_prompt.composition: Medium shot, emphasizing the character's overwhelm.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: Cansado de que el dinero te controle? Tu mentalidad es la llave.

subjects.description: The same stick figure woman, looking dejected, sitting at a desk piled high with bills.
subjects.action: She is holding a pen, about to sign another payment, her shoulders slumped.

image_prompt.environment: A drab, small desk in a dimly lit apartment.
image_prompt.composition: Close-up on the character's face and the pile of bills.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: Trabajando duro, pero el progreso parece un espejismo, ¿verdad?

subjects.description: Stylized coins and bills are shown as sharp, aggressive spikes, piercing a large red dollar sign.
subjects.action: The spikes are actively piercing the dollar sign.

image_prompt.environment: A stark, white background with abstract red lines.
image_prompt.lighting: Harsh, direct lighting highlighting the aggression.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: Cada pago, un mordisco más a tus sueños.

subjects.description: The stick figure woman is shown with a question mark above her head, surrounded by confusing financial charts and numbers.
subjects.action: She is looking bewildered, gesturing helplessly.

image_prompt.environment: An abstract, chaotic space filled with swirling financial data.
image_prompt.composition: Wide shot to show the extent of her confusion.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: Si sigues haciendo lo mismo, obtendrás lo mismo.

subjects.description: A bright, glowing lightbulb appears above the head of the stick figure woman.

image_prompt.environment: The same drab room from Scene 2, but now with a spotlight on the character.
image_prompt.composition: Close-up on the character's head, with the lightbulb prominently displayed.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: Pero, ¿y si te dijera que existe un secreto?

subjects.description: A stack of coins and bills is shown. From the top coin, a small green sprout is emerging.
subjects.action: The sprout is growing upwards from the coin.

image_prompt.environment: A clean, minimalist background with a few stylized plants.
image_prompt.composition: Medium shot, focusing on the money and the sprout.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: Un principio simple que cambia todo: ¡Págate a ti primero!

subjects.description: Two stylized piggy banks are shown. One is labeled 'Gastos' (Expenses) and is overflowing with bills. The other is labeled 'Ahorro' (Savings) and has a small, healthy plant growing out of it.
subjects.action: The 'Gastos' piggy bank has bills spilling out, while the 'Ahorro' piggy bank has a plant growing.

image_prompt.environment: A split background: one side chaotic, the other serene.
image_prompt.lighting: Contrasting lighting: dark on the left, bright on the right.
image_prompt.composition: Eye-level shot, showing both piggy banks clearly.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: Antes de pagar las facturas, antes de cualquier gasto, destina una porción a tu futuro.

subjects.description: A stylized chart showing a small bar representing current income. A portion of it is being redirected to a growing bar labeled 'Ahorro'.
subjects.action: An arrow shows money flowing from 'Ingresos' to 'Ahorro'.

image_prompt.environment: A clean, simple infographic style background.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: Piensa en ello como tu semilla de riqueza, ¡plantada antes que nada!

subjects.description: A stylized visual of a snowball rolling down a hill, gathering size and momentum. It is labeled 'Interés Compuesto'.
subjects.action: The snowball is growing larger as it rolls.

image_prompt.environment: A stylized snowy hill with a clear path.
image_prompt.composition: Dynamic angle showing the snowball's descent.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: Esa pequeña cantidad, con el tiempo, se convierte en una montaña de posibilidades gracias al interés compuesto.

subjects.description: The stick figure woman is now shown with a confident smile, holding a small plant that is growing rapidly. The plant has coins as leaves.
subjects.action: She is watering the plant with a small watering can.

image_prompt.environment: A bright, sunny room with a window showing a pleasant view.
image_prompt.composition: Medium shot, focusing on the character and her thriving plant.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: No es magia, es disciplina y visión de futuro.

subjects.description: The same stick figure woman, now dressed professionally, is sitting in a modern, bright office, working on a laptop. A small, thriving plant sits on her desk.
subjects.action: She is typing efficiently and looking pleased.

image_prompt.environment: A clean, modern, sunlit office space.
image_prompt.composition: Wide shot to showcase her new environment.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: Lo que antes era una carga, ahora es el combustible de tu libertad.

subjects.description: A stylized map with a clear, golden path leading from a starting point (labeled 'Deudas') to a treasure chest (labeled 'Futuro Financiero').
subjects.action: The path is illuminated and inviting.

image_prompt.environment: An abstract, adventurous background with subtle textures.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: Tu futuro financiero no es un destino lejano, es un mapa que tú mismo diseñas.

subjects.description: The stick figure woman, now exuding confidence, is standing tall with a glowing green chart showing upward growth behind her.
subjects.action: She is pointing forward with a determined expression.

image_prompt.environment: A stylized, abstract landscape of growth and opportunity.
image_prompt.style: Dynamic hand-drawn 2D webcomic sketch style, thick expressive black ink outlines, vibrant minimalist color palette for highlights, clean shading, white background with glowing accents.

scenes.narration: Empieza hoy. Tu yo del futuro te lo agradecerá.
